message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 154 progress comment

RusticMaple: vendored/mux_client.rs — unix_stream_read_with_cx
added + read_next_pdu_with_cx L1725 migrated. Adds second cancel
gate immediately before kernel read, between the existing loop-
entry checkpoint_mux_cx and the read itself. mux_client.rs cx
coverage 32/32 (non-test, non-legacy-only).
